entries.name: XDaiForeignBridge
entries.description: Ethereum-side ERC20-to-native bridge used to lock DAI or USDS on Ethereum and authorize xDAI minting on Gnosis. Message execution is validated by a dedicated validator set and can additionally be gated by Hashi.

HASHI_IS_MANDATORY.description: If true, validator-approved bridge messages also require Hashi validation before execution.

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign xDAI bridge messages before they can be executed on Ethereum.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for xDAI bridge messages from Gnosis.

entries.name: ForeignAMB
entries.description: Ethereum-side Arbitrary Message Bridge endpoint that verifies validator signatures before relaying cross-chain calls to Gnosis. Hashi can be enabled as an additional verification layer.

HASHI_IS_MANDATORY.description: If true, validator-approved AMB messages also require Hashi validation before execution.

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign AMB bridge messages before they can be executed on Ethereum.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for AMB messages from Gnosis.

entries.name: ForeignOmnibridge TokenFactory
entries.description: Factory used by Omnibridge to deploy wrapped tokens representing assets native to the other chain.

tokenImage.description: Template implementation cloned for newly deployed Omnibridge wrapped tokens.

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: ForeignOmnibridge
entries.description: Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator used for arbitrary token transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis via the AMB bridge.

bridgeContract.description: AMB bridge endpoint used as the cross-chain messaging layer for the Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator.

requestGasLimit.description: Gas limit forwarded for Omnibridge message execution on Gnosis.

tokenFactory.description: Factory used to deploy wrapped tokens for assets bridged from Gnosis to Ethereum.

entries.name: BridgeRouter
entries.description: Entry router for bridging between Ethereum and Gnosis. It routes DAI and USDS through the legacy xDAI bridge, ETH through the WETH Omnibridge router, and other ERC20 tokens through Omnibridge.

FOREIGN_XDAIBRIDGE.description: Legacy DAI or USDS bridge used for canonical stablecoin transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis.

FOREIGN_AMB.description: Ethereum-side Arbitrary Message Bridge endpoint used by the Gnosis bridge system for cross-chain calls.

FOREIGN_OMNIBRIDGE.description: Ethereum-side Omnibridge mediator used for arbitrary token transfers between Ethereum and Gnosis.

WETH_OMNIBRIDGE_ROUTER.description: ETH-specific router that wraps ETH into WETH before sending it through Omnibridge.

entries.name: WETHOmnibridgeRouter
entries.description: Router that wraps native ETH into WETH before sending it through Omnibridge and unwraps it again on Gnosis when bridge messages are executed.

bridge.description: ForeignOmnibridge mediator used as the actual cross-chain bridge for ETH transfers.

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: XDai Bridge Validators
entries.description: Validator set contract used by the bridge to require threshold signatures before cross-chain messages can be executed.

$members.description: Array of the signers in the validator multisig

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: AMB Validators
entries.description: Validator set contract used by the bridge to require threshold signatures before cross-chain messages can be executed.

$members.description: Array of the signers in the validator multisig

entries.name: SBCDepositContract
entries.description: Gnosis Beacon Chain deposit contract escrowing all validator-staked GNO. Differs from the similar contract on Ethereum by being upgradable, allowing critical permissioned function access and using the non-gastoken GNO as its staking token.

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: HomeOmnibridge Fee Manager
entries.description: Fee manager used by HomeOmnibridge to calculate and distribute bridge fees to a configured reward address list.

mediator.description: HomeOmnibridge mediator allowed to route fees through this manager.

rewardAddressList.description: Addresses that receive fees distributed by the HomeOmnibridge fee manager.

entries.name: HomeOmnibridge Gas Limit Manager
entries.description: Module used by HomeOmnibridge to choose default, selector-specific, and token-specific gas limits for cross-chain Omnibridge message execution.

bridge.description: AMB bridge that reads gas limits from this manager for HomeOmnibridge messages.

requestGasLimit.description: Default gas limit used for Omnibridge message execution on Ethereum unless a selector-specific or token-specific override is configured.

entries.name: HomeAMB
entries.description: Gnosis-side Arbitrary Message Bridge endpoint that verifies validator signatures before relaying cross-chain calls to Ethereum. Hashi can be enabled as an additional verification layer.

validatorContract.description: Validator contract that must sign AMB bridge messages before they can be executed on Gnosis.

hashiManager.description: Optional Hashi-based validation manager used as an additional verification layer for AMB messages from Ethereum.

HASHI_IS_MANDATORY.description: If true, validator-approved AMB messages also require Hashi validation before execution.

entries.name: Omnibridge Fee Distributor Safe
entries.description: Safe that currently receives Omnibridge fees distributed by the HomeOmnibridge fee manager.

receivedPermissions.description: pause or unpause beacon chain deposits, execute system withdrawals manually if required, and recover accidentally sent non-stake tokens.
change Omnibridge fee schedules and the list of addresses that receive distributed bridge fees.
change default, selector-specific, and token-specific gas limits used by HomeOmnibridge cross-chain messages.
change validator and Hashi-based message verification settings, chain identifiers, gas parameters, and reentrancy policy for AMB messages.
claim tokens accidentally held by the AMB bridge contract.
change the threshold and manage signers.
change which Omnibridge transfers are routed through the oracle-driven lane or forced into the manual lane.
change the token implementation used for newly deployed Omnibridge wrapped tokens.
change the counterpart mediator, the AMB bridge endpoint, token factory, fee, gas-limit, and forwarding-rules managers, token pairs, and per-token bridge limits for Omnibridge transfers.
fix bridge imbalances and claim unsupported tokens or assets held by the mediator or bridged token contracts.

entries.name: GNO token
entries.description: Immutable GNO token smart contract contract, administered from the Ethereum side by the Gnosis Bridge contract.

$implementation.description: Address of the underlying token logic. The TokenProxy constructor permanently sets this slot, meaning this proxy is explicitly non-upgradeable.

bridgeContract.description: Recognized bridge contract. Token transfers to this address automatically trigger a call to `onTokenTransfer()`, which is by default the cross-chain bridging operation.

entries.name: HomeAMB Validators
entries.description: Validator set contract used by the bridge to require threshold signatures before cross-chain messages can be executed.

receivedPermissions.description: mint the token, update the designated bridge contract, recover unsupported tokens accidentally sent to the contract and set the `mintingFinished` state, which disallows further minting.

$members.description: Array of the signers in the validator multisig

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.
can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: HomeOmnibridge Forwarding Rules Manager
entries.description: Module used by HomeOmnibridge to decide whether specific tokens, senders, or receivers must use the oracle-driven lane or the manual lane for bridge requests.

receivedPermissions.description: can sign bridge messages between Ethereum and Gnosis.

entries.name: HomeOmnibridge TokenFactory
entries.description: Factory used by Omnibridge to deploy wrapped tokens representing assets native to the other chain.

tokenImage.description: Template implementation cloned for newly deployed Omnibridge wrapped tokens.

entries.name: HomeOmnibridge
entries.description: Gnosis-side Omnibridge mediator used for arbitrary token transfers between Gnosis and Ethereum via the AMB bridge.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: mint the token, update the designated bridge contract, recover unsupported tokens accidentally sent to the contract and set the `mintingFinished` state, which disallows further minting.

bridgeContract.description: AMB bridge endpoint used as the cross-chain messaging layer for the Gnosis-side Omnibridge mediator.

tokenFactory.description: Factory used to deploy wrapped tokens for assets bridged from Ethereum to Gnosis.

feeManager.description: Module that computes and distributes Omnibridge fees on Gnosis.

forwardingRulesManager.description: Module that chooses whether Omnibridge requests use the oracle-driven lane or the manual lane.

gasLimitManager.description: Module that chooses request gas limits for Omnibridge cross-chain messages.
